note: Per-file SHA-256 and sizes were recomputed from the local candle files immediately before any execution decision and compared against the committed PR-B.1 inventory. All 20 matched. Per-file hashes are NOT re-listed here; they are the committed reference in the PR-B.1 inventory (referenced above) to avoid redundant hash duplication. This report records only the aggregate re-verification outcome. Local file paths are intentionally omitted; files are identified by the epoch inventory (logical filename + hash), not by any runtime path.
